context: The agent is asked to audit and fix an Effect TypeScript project configuration. This scenario tests whether the agent knows the correct package selection (no @effect/schema, single platform runtime), required tsconfig options, language-service setup, and VS Code workspace TypeScript settings.

checklist.name: Removed @effect/schema
checklist.description: The corrected package.json does not include @effect/schema as a dependency, since Schema is part of the effect package itself

checklist.name: Single platform package
checklist.description: The corrected package.json includes only one platform runtime package (@effect/platform-node, since the project targets Node.js), and @effect/platform-bun is removed

checklist.name: Test framework added
checklist.description: vitest and @effect/vitest are added to the dependencies or devDependencies in the corrected package.json

checklist.name: strict: true set
checklist.description: The corrected tsconfig.json has strict set to true

checklist.name: exactOptionalPropertyTypes
checklist.description: The corrected tsconfig.json includes exactOptionalPropertyTypes: true

checklist.name: verbatimModuleSyntax
checklist.description: The corrected tsconfig.json includes verbatimModuleSyntax: true

checklist.name: noUnusedLocals
checklist.description: The corrected tsconfig.json includes noUnusedLocals: true

checklist.name: noImplicitOverride
checklist.description: The corrected tsconfig.json includes noImplicitOverride: true

checklist.name: Language service plugin
checklist.description: The corrected tsconfig.json includes @effect/language-service in the compilerOptions.plugins array

checklist.name: language-service in package.json
checklist.description: The corrected package.json includes @effect/language-service as a dev dependency

checklist.name: VS Code workspace TypeScript
checklist.description: The .vscode/settings.json file sets typescript.tsdk to ./node_modules/typescript/lib and enables typescript.enablePromptUseWorkspaceTsdk: true

checklist.name: Audit report completeness
checklist.description: AUDIT.md explains each category of problem found (wrong schema package, dual platform runtimes, missing test tools, tsconfig strictness gaps, missing language service) with a reason for each fix

checklist.name: Node module settings
checklist.description: The corrected tsconfig.json uses module: NodeNext (or similar Node-appropriate setting) rather than a bundler-only setting, consistent with the Node.js runtime target
